creator: k@stereochro.me
text:
Created attachment 171001
MASTER_SITES fix.

Essentially, this changes the hostname from maude.cs.uiuc.edu to maude.cs.illinois.edu, which fixes fetching.

Full Maude is still an issue: the version being fetched currently is a patched version, not the original 2.6 version. The real solution to this is to switch to Maude 2.7, which I'm hoping to do if this patch is accepted when I have some free time.
